quick_skim.title: SemEval-2026 Task 9: Detecting Multilingual, Multicultural and Multievent Online Polarization
quick_skim.abstract: We present SemEval-2026 Task 9, a shared task on online polarization detection, covering 22 languages and comprising over 110K annotated instances. Each data instance is multi-labeled with the presence of polarization, polarization type, and polarization manifestation. Participants were asked to predict labels in three sub-tasks: (1) detecting the presence of polarization, (2) identifying the type of polarization, and (3) recognizing the polarization manifestation. The three tasks attracted over 1,000 participants worldwide and more than 10k submission on Codabench. We received final submissions from 67 teams and 73 system description papers. We report the baseline results and analyze the performance of the best-performing systems, highlighting the most common approaches and the most effective methods across different subtasks and languages. The dataset of this task is publicly available.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Detecting online polarization is a form of sentiment and opinion analysis involving classification of stances.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 检测在线极化是情感和观点分析的一种形式，涉及立场分类。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 检测在线极化是情感和观点分析的一种形式，涉及立场分类。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 检测在线极化是情感和观点分析的一种形式，涉及立场分类。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a task for detecting multilingual online polarization, which is closely related to sentiment analysis.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 介绍了一项多语言在线极化检测任务，这与情感分析和倾向性识别密切相关。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 介绍了一项多语言在线极化检测任务，这与情感分析和倾向性识别密切相关。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 情感分析, especially work that connects or combines: 文本中的情感特征和倾向分析; 如何从文本中准确识别和分类情感.
